message:
fix: SystemPromptAsUser combines sys+task into one user message

Previously the flag prepended the system prompt as a separate User
message before the task delegation message.  GPT-5.4 ignored it
because it was at the beginning of context, separated from the task.

Now the system prompt text is merged into the first user message
(system prompt first, then task text) so instructions are adjacent
to the task in a single message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
